description: Create a detailed architectural floor plan for a 2-bedroom luxury apartment listing based on the specifications provided in '~/Desktop/apartment_specs.txt'. Using draw.io Desktop, design a professional floor plan diagram that includes walls, doors, windows, and furniture as specified. The layout must feature eight distinct spaces: Entry Foyer, Living/Dining, Kitchen, Master Bedroom, Master Bath, Walk-in Closet, Second Bedroom, and Second Bath. Each room must be labeled with its name and dimensions (e.g., 'Master Bedroom 14\' x 12\''). Include a title block with the text 'Unit 38F - 2BR/2BA - 1,150 sq ft - MiMA Tower'. Save the editable diagram as '~/Desktop/apartment_floorplan.drawio' and export the final view as a PNG image to '~/Desktop/apartment_floorplan.png'.
